i am extremely disappointed with my recent experience booking a stay at holiday inn
last week i reserved a room with wedding block i was attending not part of the wedding block but at the same location
the hotel i originally intended to book was fully booked but instead of clearly notifying me the holiday inn website automatically rerouted me to another location without my knowledge
the website displayed a brief second message that there were no rooms available at my desired location
then it rerouted me to a different page with alternate hotel locations but still displayed the original hotel’s address at the top making it appear as though i had booked at the correct location
it was only after receiving the confirmation email that i realized i had booked the wrong hotel

i have attached a photo showing the correctwedding block hotel location with a different location as the top result for booking note that there is no message or alert that the location i was looking to book at did not have any rooms available

when i called holiday inn customer service to correct the mistake i was told that due to the rate i had booked they would not allow me to cancel or modify the reservation without being charged one night
this was incredibly frustrating as i had called immediately after noticing the error
when rooms did become available at the correct hotel they refused to transfer my reservation instead insisting that i cancel pay a penalty of one night and then rebook at the correct hotel
this deceitful booking practice and refusal to accommodate such a simple request is incredibly disappointing
i hope this review serves as a warning to others
be very careful when booking through holiday inns website as their practices are misleading and their customer service while kind was completely unhelpful

as i was walking to the doors i slipped on the snow and ice and slid into the rocks
when we finally made it inside our key was demagnetized so it took even longer to get in and warm up though it hadnt been mentioned that this could happen
we spent the next day staying in and had noticed that no one had gone to shovel the entry way yet even though it was sunny and no snow was in the forecast
the next morningmonday we were woken by a fire alarm going off and had to run out quickly
let me add that the sidewalk to the entryway had still not been shoveled from where i originally fell
the alarms were going off because of several burst pipes on the th floor and immediate flooding
once we got clearance to go back in the alarms kept going off and on
we went through the rest of our day though now in pain from the fall combined with the activity of the alarms and myself being handicapped made for a difficult escape from the alarms
to put the cherry on top of our disaster stay as we were settling in for the night i noticed the carpet in front of our door was soaked and it was this way to the closet
our room had a pool of water in front of it and was flooding
we were offered a nd floor room or a refund of our stay and at that point we were ready to leave
it was at night and we had no energy to pack up unpack and repack
we were told there was no management on duty at night and no one knew how to refund but we would hear from someone soon
its now over a month later and we have yet to get our refund

i had an extremely frustrating and disappointing experience during my stay
my car was hit overnight in the hotel parking lot and the driver fled the scene
a clear piece of the other vehicle the red cover of a tail light was left on the ground next to my car clearly indicating a hit and run
when i reported the incident the front desk contacted the manager
unfortunately the manager’s response was unprofessional dismissive and completely lacking empathy
she immediately stated that reviewing the cameras would not be helpful because she “didn’t know what time it happened” and claimed she could not review footage from the entire night
i offered to review the footage myself and explained that the police would likely need to review it anyway

she refused and repeatedly insisted that even if a car was seen near mine it could not be assumed to be responsible suggesting the tail light cover might have fallen off earlier and that the driver could have been “just passing by
” throughout the conversation she continued to defend the unknown driver rather than support a guest whose vehicle had been damaged on hotel property
given her response i told her clearly that her handling of the situation was unacceptable and asked that she speak with my husband instead as i was no longer willing to continue the conversation
i then stepped away and sat in the lobby area
while seated nearby i could still hear the manager speaking loudly about the situation to the front desk staff making dismissive and mocking comments as if to justify herself and minimize my concern
this behavior felt highly inappropriate and unprofessional especially considering the stress of the situation
this reasoning was especially unreasonable given the location
this is a quiet mountain area with virtually no activity overnight
the parking lot was nearly empty and it is highly unlikely that multiple vehicles were coming and going throughout the night
any vehicle moving near mine would have stood out clearly
what makes this situation even more troubling is that later that same morning the police located the responsible driver who was arrested for dui and hit and run
the tail light cover found next to my car matched his vehicle exactly
in other words the incident the manager refused to take seriously or investigate was completely legitimate
i expect far more from someone in a management position
when a guest experiences property damage on hotel grounds the response should involve support professionalism and a willingness to assist not dismissal excuses or public commentary about the guest
because of the manager’s behavior and lack of accountability this stay was unacceptable
i would not stay here again and cannot recommend this hotel while this type of management behavior continues

i recently had the pleasure of staying with my family at the holiday inn in estes park colorado and i couldn’t have asked for a better location
conveniently located right near the rocky mountain national park the hotel offers breathtaking mountain views and is just minutes from the park entrance
it’s also close to downtown estes park making it easy to explore local shops restaurants and trails without having to drive far
whether you’re visiting for hiking wildlife viewing or simply to enjoy the fresh mountain air this hotel puts you right where you want to be
during the summer time there’s a free shuttle silver route that runs through pm
what truly set this stay apart though was the exceptional customer service
from checkin to checkout the staff went above and beyond to ensure our comfort
everyone was warm welcoming and genuinely helpful—offering personalized recommendations for local dining and hikes and promptly addressing any request we had
their local knowledge and professionalism made us feel right at home and it was clear that guest satisfaction is a top priority at this property
alexis operations manager was very engaged and was super helpful
he personally congratulated me on a special occasion we were celebrating
the staff including jeff ej and others were fantastic too
the amenities were another highlight of our stay
the hotel features a wellequipped fitness center a relaxing indoor pool and hot tub a family game room and spacious modern rooms that were spotless and comfortable
the onsite restaurant served an excellent hot breakfast buffet and evening meals with a great variety of options
we also appreciated the free parking and reliable wifi which made everything more convenient
all in all the holiday inn at estes park combines the perfect mountain location with toptier service and amenities—i’d highly recommend it to anyone planning a trip to the area

hotel location was great about a minute walk minute drive to the touristy downtown area of estes park and a minute drive to rocky mountain national park
the exterior looked a little tired and worn with the lot needing to be seal coated and restriped
the reception and lobby appeared to have been recently updated and had a nice ambiance lighting and seating areas
the hotel provided a bevi machine and free coffee and tea available at all times of the day in the lobby area
in addition the fire pits and complimentary s’more kits were a nice added touch
we didn’t use the pool but it looked very nice although i would not want to be in the rooms which overlooked the pool just from a noise ambiance perspective
the hotel also had a gaming room with some arcade games and a pool ping pong table

there were so many good breakfast places around the area that while free breakfast is a great perk and a cost benefit to families it wasn’t a major issue for two of us

we did have some issues with accessibility due to the elevator from the ground floor to the st floor hallway being inoperable so we had to carry our luggage up stairs to access the hallway where the elevator to our nd floor room was located
we did relay this issue to staff and it appeared to have been remedied the following day
there did not appear to be a freightstaff elevator so elevator traffic when we were trying to check out along with housekeeping was a little high
the room itself appears to have had interior upgrades with newer millwork lighting fixtures near the beds and carpeting
the immediate issue we noticed was a mildew smell that didn’t go away with the ac set to dry mode and most likely due to lack of ventilation in the bathrooms
the smell was lingering where if you left the room and came back you could smell it but you eventually became sort of “nose blind” to it
bathroom vanities were newer but not a lot of room to spread out toiletries and the bathtub shower was in need of a full replacement
you could see that they installed newer plastic tub shower inserts but there was mildew on the shower curtains and unfortunately
never aired out fully
ac was very loud so ear plugs are recommended
trash can liners were not installed in the trash cans when we arrived so the room condition on immediate first impression was not great
in addition the room was an older style where you have a door between if you wanted to share adjoining rooms
the noise buffer acoustics between rooms was almost nonexistent and we had a family with smaller children so we could definitely hear all conversations
overall stay with the bathroom and room utilities being the main detractors

i had the pleasure of staying at the holiday inn express suites in colorado springs from september th to nd attending the annual fallen fire fighter memorial service
while my boyfriend has stayed here several times before this was my first experience—and i was thoroughly impressed
the hotel itself is clean comfortable and beautifully maintained but what truly stood out to me was the hospitality of the staff
having worked in the hospitality and customer experience industries for over years i can confidently say that the service here rivals some of the best
lara in particular was an absolute gem
she mentioned that this memorial event is her favorite time of year and her warmth and delight in serving the guests were clear
one small example of her dedication when my boyfriend asked if there was any ibuprofen available she graciously offered him some of her personal supply
she explained that she keeps a stock on hand for situations like this—going above and beyond to care for guests
in my experience thats the kind of thoughtful guestfirst attitude you simply cant teach
if i were in a position to recruit id snap lara up in a heartbeat
jojo was equally wonderful always ready with a friendly sociable attitude
he drove us to and from multiple locations without hesitation and made excellent dining recommendations
will also provided excellent transportation when jojo was off duty and we felt completely taken care of by the entire team who elevate a stay beyond just comfort

i had a wonderful stay at the holiday inn and suites in colorado springs
here are a few things that i particularly enjoyed about my stay
clean and freshsmelling rooms
one of the things that stood out to me about the holiday inn and suites was how clean and freshsmelling the rooms were
compared to other hotel chains which allow pets and can sometimes have a musty smell as a result the holiday inn and suites was a breath of fresh air
the rooms were impeccably clean and had a pleasant hotelfresh scent that made it feel like a truly relaxing and enjoyable place to stay
friendly front desk staff
the lady working the front desk was another highlight of my stay
she greeted me and my two daughters every time we walked in the front doors from checkin to checkout
her friendly and welcoming demeanor made us feel right at home and added to the overall positive atmosphere of the hotel
thorough housekeeping
the housekeeping staff at the holiday inn and suites were also topnotch
they did a thorough job of cleaning our room each day making sure that every detail was taken care of and that we had everything we needed for a comfortable stay
delicious breakfast
the breakfast at the holiday inn and suites was another highlight
they offered a wide variety of options including eggs bacon sausage pancakes and more
everything was cooked nicely and tasted delicious making it the perfect way to start each day of our stay
pool and hot tub
finally i have to mention the pool and hot tub
we swam in them every single day and loved every minute of it
the pool was the perfect size for swimming laps or just splashing around and the hot tub was the perfect way to relax and unwind after a long day of sightseeing
overall i would highly recommend the holiday inn and suites in colorado springs to anyone looking for a clean comfortable and enjoyable place to stay

my daughter and i were in denver for a basketball tournament
we found this hotel as it was between downtown and the airport
when we arrived we had a bedroom suite
the room was huge
nice living area and a king size bed in the other room

too bad we didnt get to enjoy it
our issue came in the first night
at am i started hearing water dripping
i went into the bathroom to check and water was pouring from the ceiling into the bathroom
i called the front desk and they said they would send someone up
minutes later security showed up and said he would look into it
it ends up that the person above us fell asleep with the water on in the tub
now it has been around minutes in the middle of the night
i called back to the front desk asking for a new room
i was told they were sold out and that they couldnt help me
we couldnt stay where we were
i was told to wait and she would get back to me
finally minutes later someone came up and they moved us to another room as someone didnt show up
good thing since i dont know what we would have done without a room
this room was ok but not as nice and not what we paid for
finally back to sleep
the next morning i went to speak to the front desk about the issue and to see what they would do for us due to the issue
the person working was not very helpful and said they could give us some ihg points
this was not acceptable
i asked for a manger and was told she was on maternity leave
i asked for someone that could help me
she said someone would be in later in the day
finally i found someone to help
she said she couldnt guarantee but she gave me her number and told me she would call me when she resolved the issue
finally we were taken care of
crazy experience

from start to finish leslie navarro the sales and catering manager went above and beyond to ensure every detail was flawless making our reunion an unforgettable experience
exceptional service the hotel staff provided exceptional service accommodating our every need with a smile
from the event planning process to the day of the reunion their attention to detail and commitment to making our event a success were evident

they understood the significance of our reunion and worked tirelessly to ensure everything went smoothly
whether it was arranging special seating for those with mobility issues or coordinating with our event planner the hotel staff was on top of everything
overall the holiday inn lakewood exceeded our expectations in every way
our year reunion was a resounding success and much of that is thanks to the outstanding team at this hotel
if youre looking for a venue that offers exceptional service beautiful spaces and a commitment to making your event truly special i highly recommend the holiday inn lakewood

i was able to handle intensive video conferencing manage largescale data transfers and run multiple cloudbased applications simultaneously without a single hint of lag or latency

мы отдыхали в этом отеле в дубае вместе с папой и остались в полном восторге
начну с того что весь персонал отеля невероятно вежливый добродушный и всегда готов помочь в любой ситуации
это чувствуется с первых минут пребывания
отель мы выбирали исходя из экономии так как в период новогодних праздников цены в дубае были очень высокими
отель расположенный недалеко от аэропорта альмактум оказался для нас самым оптимальным вариантом
при этом мы совершенно не ощутили никакого дискомфорта или «неполноты» — в отеле было абсолютно всё для комфортного отдыха
питание — выше всяких похвал
отличные завтраки и обеды очень разнообразная и вкусная еда мы были в полном восторге
во время приёмов пищи персонал постоянно подходил интересовался всё ли хорошо предлагал напитки — обслуживание на высшем уровне
также большим плюсом стало наличие бесплатных автобусов до метро пляжа марина и торгового центра
несмотря на то что отель находится не в центре добраться можно было без проблем
автобусы ходят бесплатно по предварительной записи за день записаться нужно на ресепшене в и в
мы правда чаще пользовались такси — поездка до центра обходилась примерно в – дирхам
номера в отеле очень хорошие и полностью укомплектованы есть утюг зубные щётки гель для душа шампунь кондиционер и всё необходимое
мы были приятно удивлены
в отеле всегда очень приятно пахнет что создаёт особую атмосферу уюта
на территории отеля есть красивый бассейн с теплой водой
в те дни когда мы не хотели ехать на пляж спокойно оставались в отеле загорали и наслаждались отдыхом
отдельно ещё раз хочу отметить персонал — все всегда улыбаются искренне стараются помочь и сделать ваш отдых максимально комфортным
за всё время проживания у нас не возникло абсолютно никаких проблем
в итоге могу сказать что соотношение цены и качества здесь просто отличное
если для вас принципиально жить именно в центре города — возможно этот отель не подойдёт
но если расположение не играет ключевой роли а важны комфорт сервис питание и выгодная цена то это отличный выбор

my daughter and i were planning to visit relatives in parker co so on june i made two reservations
i made one for myself and one for my adult daughter for a stay at the holiday inn located at cottonwood drive parker co from july to july through the ihg website
i used points for one reservation and booked the other at the standard rate
both reservations had the same confirmation number as they were made simultaneously and each was for a king room
when i checked in on friday july i was informed that there was only one reservation the standard rate one and that the reservation made with points was missing
despite presenting my confirmation the front desk clerk insisted there was no record of that reservation and stated that all rooms were fully booked which forced us to share a single room
sharing a room with my adult daughter was unacceptable so i had to seek alternative accommodations for one of us
after reviewing my ihg account i saw that my points had been deducted but were later refunded

when i contacted ihg customer service about the points return and the cancellation of my reservation without prior notice i was told that using points for rooms on the fourth of july weekend was not allowed
i asked why i was able to book it online despite this restriction and the representative explained that booking online using points must have been a mistake on the ihg website
the ihg website allowed me to book a room using points but ihgholiday inn later deemed this booking impermissible for that weekend
my reservation was canceled without notification and ihgholiday inn did not take adequate steps to resolve the situation
the only response from customer service was sorry that happened but there was a suite available that i would have to pay half price for and it was only available for one night
it is hard for me to believe that the hotel was entirely full especially since the parking lot was less than half full
as a loyal ihg platinum elite member since i have never encountered a situation like this

i am extremely dissatisfied with how ihgholiday inn handled this matter—canceling my reservation failing to inform me of the cancellation not honoring my reservation and making no attempt to resolve the issue apart from offering a paid room that was only available for one night
because of this experience i will no longer stay at any ihg locations and will be canceling my ihg membership and credit card

i asked if we can check in using my daughters id he said no since the reservation was under my name

i would definitely consider staying at holiday inn again in the future

during our stay at this hotel in dubai my skirt was damaged by the hotel’s own ironing equipment which was dirtydefective
as a result the skirt was burned and permanently stained
we immediately reported this to the hotel staff
we were told a solution would be provided the same evening
this never happened
the next morning we were again promised followup but no one contacted us
at checkout the staff claimed they were unaware of the situation
after waiting over two hours the manager hermano spoke to us and placed the blame entirely on us despite the damage being caused by hotel equipment
the way this was handled and the tone used were disrespectful and unprofessional
in addition to this incident the room was not clean and the shower drain was clogged causing the entire bathroom to flood
these issues further highlight the lack of proper maintenance and attention to basic hygiene
the only “compensation” offered was a free lunch completely inadequate and irrelevant as it does not cover the damage caused
no responsibility was taken no sincere apology was offered and the situation was handled very poorly
this experience showed a lack of accountability communication and basic customer service
we expected much better from a hotel in dubai and would not recommend this property based on how guests are treated when something goes wrong
reaction
dear mr
santoso
thank you for your response
i appreciate the time taken to reply however i must formally disagree with the explanation provided
regarding the ironing incident i would like to clearly state that the skirt in question was suitable for ironing as explicitly indicated on the care label
this label was shown to your team during our discussion as we were asked to demonstrate that ironing was permitted and the hotel was therefore fully aware of this fact
the skirt has been ironed multiple times at home without any issue using an iron
this directly contradicts the claim that the fabric requires drycleaning only or is unsuitable for direct heat
the damage occurred specifically due to residue or contamination on the hotelprovided iron not due to misuse or fabric sensitivity
had the iron been clean and in proper condition this damage would not have occurred
while goodwill gestures such as a complimentary lunch or late checkout were mentioned these do not constitute appropriate compensation for property damage
we were on holiday and after already waiting more than two hours in addition to the time lost the evening before our vacation time had already been significantly impacted
offering a late checkout assumes that spending additional time “waiting” in the hotel room is desirable which is not the case under these circumstances
similarly a complimentary lunch does not address the damage caused or the loss of valuable time
what is particularly disappointing is that we now find ourselves having to justify the situation once again

just as during the initial conversation with you at the hotel responsibility is being placed back on us while the facts we presented at the time such as the condition of the iron and the care label are being dismissed or overlooked
unfortunately it felt then and feels now that these points are not being fully acknowledged

i stayed at the holiday inn denver east for two nights while in town for a concert and overall it was a solid stay
the uber ride from the airport took about minutes with traffic
upon arrival the front desk staff member who checked me in was very friendly and accommodating
i appreciated being able to check in early for a fee which was totally worth it
the room itself was decent — the bed was extremely comfortable and i liked having a balcony
however there wasn’t any patio furniture which would have made it much more enjoyable
the water pressure in the bathroom could have been stronger but the towels were great quality
temperature in the room stayed comfortable the whole time which made it easy to relax
one of the best features is their complimentary shuttle which takes you within a mile radius of the hotel
the first driver we had was excellent — very kind and accommodating
unfortunately the second driver we encountered during most of our stay was noticeably rude and standoffish which put a damper on the otherwise helpful service
i also visited the bar during my stay
the drinks were really good but the bar staff came across as a bit rude which was disappointing compared to the quality of the cocktails
on the positive side i was granted a late checkout on my last day which was a huge bonus since i had a later flight
that extra bit of flexibility really stood out
would i recommend yes — for a quick trip this hotel is comfortable wellpriced and has nice amenities
just know that service experiences may vary

my stay at the holiday inn denver east from december to january was a mix of highs and lows

walking into the hotel was delightful—the setup is unique and the atmosphere felt promising
however the issues began at checkin
despite requesting a mountainview room we were initially assigned a room on the east side of the hotel
after some effort we were moved from the th floor to the th floor to room
sadly the room wasn’t problemfree
that evening we discovered the water pressure and temperature were virtually nonexistent making it impossible to take a proper shower
to add to the frustration the room phone didn’t work forcing me to go downstairs to report the issue
the front desk staff logged the problem and assured us it would be addressed
however despite being gone all day for our wedding on new year’s eve the issue remained unresolved when we returned
after another report on new year’s day we finally requested a room change
throughout our stay no manager reached out to apologize or offer any resolution which was disappointing
as an ihg member i usually expect a warm welcome and even small gestures like complimentary snacks but this experience fell far short of expectations
on a positive note we appreciated the hotel’s aesthetics and overall vibe
despite the poor service during this stay i would consider returning but only if there are assurances that similar issues won’t occur
hopefully the management can improve its communication and responsiveness to ensure a better experience for future guests

our stay at this hotel in dubai was much more than a simple visit it was an experience defined by kindness attention and genuine hospitality
from the very first moment we felt that there was something special here
it is not only about comfort or services—although those are excellent—but about people
every member of the hotel staff showed extraordinary care professionalism and attentiveness throughout our stay
i wish i could remember everyone’s name because each person with their smile and willingness to help contributed to making this experience so enjoyable
among the faces we will carry with us i would especially like to thank marie anne who welcomed us every morning at breakfast with sincere kindness and a radiant smile
it was she who enthusiastically introduced me to karak the wonderfully aromatic spiced tea so beloved in the emirates—such a small gesture yet it became a truly special memory of our trip

a heartfelt thank you also to jasmine at the restaurant always attentive and gracious to kaung always helpful and considerate and to laxman who took great care in maintaining the floors and ensuring our room was always perfectly clean
our room was spacious bright and very comfortable with a completely renovated and modern bathroom
everything was spotless and thoughtfully designed for the comfort of guests
the wifi also worked perfectly which is always greatly appreciated
we had chosen the halfboard option with breakfast and dinner and it proved to be an excellent choice
breakfast offered a perfect balance between sweet and savory options every morning while dinner was always a pleasant discovery with a variety of dishes that changed each evening
a special mention must go to the desserts every night they were simply delicious and the perfect way to end the day
the hotel also offers a very convenient underground parking area particularly useful for those traveling by car
we also appreciated the thoughtful service at the reception desk where guests can receive complimentary towels if they wish to go to the beach—small details that reveal a genuine care for guests
our stay unexpectedly became longer due to flight cancellations related to the middle east crisis

in what could have been a difficult situation the hotel staff showed remarkable understanding and generosity they allowed us to keep the same room and also helped us by reducing the cost of the additional nights
this gesture of kindness meant a great deal to us
the hotel is also located in a very convenient area and offers a pleasant spa as well as a welcoming bar perfect for relaxing after a day exploring the city
there are hotels that simply provide good service
and then there are places that truly make you feel welcome
this hotel belongs to the second category
we will not only remember the comfortable room the delicious food or the excellent services
above all we will remember the smiles the kindness and the feeling of having been genuinely cared for
and that is what transforms a simple stay… into a memory that stays with you
when we return to dubai we will not look for another hotel
we will come back here

i have been staying at holiday inn express properties for years—mainly in canada and occasionally in europe
as a frequent business traveler even though i’m a hilton honors member i’ve always preferred ihg especially holiday inn express because the experience has consistently been excellent
unfortunately my recent stay in the uae has been the complete opposite
this has been by far the worst holiday inn express experience i’ve ever had
this trip was meant to be a vacation and the hotel genuinely affected our enjoyment
as an ihg member i feel responsible to share honest feedback so that one poor location does not damage the reputation of a brand i’ve trusted for years
the issues began immediately
the bathroom was untidy and the shower enclosure was poorly sealed causing water to flood the floor every time we used it
despite having a large number of staff they were difficult to reach and extremely slow to respond
our tv remote was missing and when i called reception no one answered
i eventually went downstairs and found two staff members free yet no one had responded to my call
housekeeping answered the first time i called but when i tried again just ten minutes later they stopped responding entirely
i even approached a staff member in the lobby who promised to come to my room within five minutes but he never showed up
another serious concern was safety
when i tried to open the curtains for sunlight the entire curtain rail fell and hit my son on the head
the crockery provided was also chipped which is unacceptable and unsafe
on the first day our room telephone wasn’t working
i informed reception and they assured me someone would come to fix it but no one ever did
we eventually had to fix the wire ourselves
the only positive aspect was that they honored a late checkout which is standard policy
i am sharing this feedback not out of bad intention but out of genuine concern and hope that the hotel improves
ihg has always been my preferred brand and i want to ensure that one poorly managed property does not reflect negatively on the entire chain

i stayed at the holiday inn express in dubai internet city for nights in january and had a pleasant experience overall
the room was comfortable wellmaintained and had all the essential amenities needed for a long stay
the bed was cozy the air‑conditioning worked perfectly and the room layout was practical for both work and relaxation
the breakfast buffet was one of the highlights of my stay
there were more than items to choose from every morning including hot dishes pastries fresh fruits cereals and beverages
the food was consistently tasty and filling and the staff managing the breakfast area were always friendly and attentive
i also used the mini gym once during my stay
it’s not very large but it’s clean and has enough equipment for a quick workout
for a budgetfriendly hotel it does the job well
the location is another big plus
the hotel is just a short walk from both the dubai internet city metro station and the tram station making it very convenient to get around the city
the surrounding neighborhood is peaceful less crowded than other parts of dubai and has a nice clean atmosphere with cafes and stores nearby
housekeeping deserves special appreciation
my room was cleaned daily by maulana who did an excellent job throughout my stay
the room was always spotless towels replaced and supplies replenished without fail
i did experience one issue during my stay — loud music from the open bar on one of the nights which made it difficult to sleep
however the staff handled it exceptionally well
leo from the front desk immediately changed my room to a quieter area as soon as i raised the concern
thanks to his quick support the rest of my nights were peaceful
overall this hotel offers great value for money a comfortable stay good food and a very helpful staff
i would definitely consider staying here again on my next visit to dubai

she was a pleasure to interact with helped us with all our questions despite the language barrier and made our stay very comfortable
the location is very convenient you can easily reach key points of the city by any type of public transport and two metro lines are within a minute walk from the hotel
the only downside for us was that the windows in our room did not open so sometimes there was a stale smell
however it would usually disappear by the next day
overall for its price category this hotel is an excellent choice and can definitely be recommended
